---
title: "Nord"
description: "A cool Nord palette tuned for terminal contrast."
---

<ComponentPreview name="theme-showcase" theme="nord" hideCode />

## Installation

```bash
npx shadcn@latest add @termcn/theme-nord
```

## Usage

```tsx
import { ThemeProvider } from "@/components/ui/theme-provider";
import { nordTheme } from "@/lib/terminal-themes/nord";
import { Badge } from "@/components/ui/badge";

export function Example() {
  return (
    <ThemeProvider theme={nordTheme}>
      <Badge variant="info">Nord</Badge>
    </ThemeProvider>
  );
}
```
